document.source_title: WHO Member States agree to extend negotiations on key annex to the Pandemic Agreement

claims.claim_text: WHO Member States have agreed to extend negotiations on the Pathogen Access and Benefit Sharing (PABS) annex.
claims.evidence_text: World Health Organization (WHO) Member States have agreed to extend negotiations on the Pathogen Access and Benefit Sharing (PABS) annex to the WHO Pandemic Agreement.

claims.claim_text: Discussions on the PABS annex will resume in late-April.
claims.evidence_text: discussions to resume in late-April ahead of its scheduled consideration by the World Health Assembly (WHA) in May.

entities.name: World Health Organization
entities.description: The specialized agency of the United Nations responsible for international public health.
entities.evidence_text: World Health Organization (WHO) Member States have agreed to extend negotiations.

entities.name: World Health Assembly
entities.evidence_text: scheduled consideration by the World Health Assembly (WHA) in May.

events.evidence_text: The decision to continue negotiations from 27 April–1 May.

events.event: Completion of negotiations on the PABS annex
events.evidence_text: The decision to continue negotiations from 27 April–1 May.

citations.title: WHO Member States agree to extend negotiations on key annex to the Pandemic Agreement

source_credibility.reason: The source is the World Health Organization, a recognized authority in public health.
